storyInfo: Right before Hoshiguma's eyes, Mifune takes a life as if it's nothing. He even forges a letter in Tessai's name. Meanwhile, Momoka is forced to investigate a 'haunted house' kaidan in Kajimachi as part of a new TV show, unaware that it is the very place Hoshiguma once called home.

attributes.content: (Yawns)
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Ooo! New senbei flavors! 'Premium muskmelon with Siracusan red sauce' and 'condensed cystymilk with honjouzou soy sauce'...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: They look delicious.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: No. I'm counting my calories! I have to watch what I eat!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Huh? Mio-san?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'll be at the agency in just a few minutes. Did you need something?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Almost there. I'm running over now!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: 'Treating fans like fools, nose in the air'...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: 'I'm no fan of hers anymore, that's for sure. She ruined the concert!'...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: 'Trying so hard to go viral, pretending to be scared—aren't you embarrassed?'...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What... what is all this?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: A media smear campaign. It started early yesterday morning—most likely the work of a rival.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Producer.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Producer! I didn't know you were coming!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What's the situation?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: It all happened so suddenly. PR is still investigating.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: This isn't just PR.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: That 'one-horned Oni' wasn't our doing, right?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Mio, you are responsible for Momoka's safety. Please get to the bottom of all this.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Of course.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Momoka, your gaffe on stage yesterday was one thing, but upstairs is more upset about something else.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: What's that...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You've been acting less and less like a pop idol lately. Then this happens, and you vanish without a trace?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: The fans didn't seem to react too negatively. I even gave them an encore. They were into it.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I was tired and hungry when I hopped offstage, not to mention scared. I just went to my favorite oden yatai, is all.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Well, how do you explain your inappropriate monologue up there?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: 'Inappropriate monologue'?! What, what did I say wrong?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Your remarks on Kajimachi.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Kajimachi? Oh. You mean the fan that——
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The Kinseki Group is the sole backer of our entire operation. They have a very tense relationship with Kajimachi right now—speaking out recklessly will only make things harder for all of us.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: I don't understand what the big deal is. I was just thinking about how I shot my first movie there.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I still remember when I got started. You told me Chairman Tessai valued my skills...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The past is the past. I'm talking about the present. Things are different now.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Besides, we've always told you to stay in your lane and stick to the script when you're onstage. The people come to see Momoka, not you, with your big mouth.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: I... I get it.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: As long as you get it.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Producer, when are we going to the recording studio? My schedule is packed today. We have to get a move on.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Meh. Actually, why don't you take a few days off.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: HUH? What?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: P-Producer! I don't need any rest! I'm used to the grind by now! We're in peak season. I know that. If I take a break now, that put us several days behind!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Maybe if you hadn't been so busy during the day yesterday, you would have been calmer last night.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: I'm sorry, but——
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: If you really want to make up for your mistakes, Momoka, I have an urgent assignment for you.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Anything!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The television station wants to book you on a show. Take a look.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: The Haunted House of Kajimachi?! Another one of these shows? Why?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: And why now, of all times, would they produce a program that makes Kajimachi look bad?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Then you'd rather take a break?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: No! I just...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka, you know that when you don't do what we say... it reflects... poorly on you.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka!
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Producer, I don't want to die!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I've known that place was haunted for forever! A bunch of people died in that house!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: They say it's... it's somehow connected to the 'Nameless Oni'. It was her there on the stage last night...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka, I will take measures to ensure your safety.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: (Quietly) Mio, back me up here.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Momoka, do not worry. I'll go with you.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mio-san... is going too?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Are you strong enough to take down that vicious Oni?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Mio tilts her head and thinks hard for a few seconds.
Maybe not.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I'm doomed. I'm done for!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.text: 'If we keep walking down Nita Street, we'll soon arrive at Kajimachi. From now on, that will be our place, our city.'
'Our city? But, Papa, we've been walking down the street, and I don't see anything all that different. What do you think, Uncle Tessai?'
'It will become different. It will change.'

attributes.content: A wind carrying a scent—woody, or perhaps musty—blows against her face, and somehow, Hoshiguma is compelled to take a deep breath.
The houses are all so old.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Does Uncle Tessai still live in the same place?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yeah. The big house at the end there.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Kinbee, what's the deal with the funeral? Kajimachi looks like it's doing fine?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's a long story.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What's wrong?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma quickly realizes why Kinbee has fallen silent—and why the expression on his face now carries a touch more respect.
Not too far away, there's an old man standing in the road, facing them.
The old man's back is slightly hunched. Yet somehow, as the wind lifts his wide sleeves, he seems to stand a little taller.
Uncle Tessai!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Chairman Tessai.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Kinbee, I told you that you are not permitted to set foot in Kajimachi ever again.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: The Phidia appears startled. The reverence on his face quickly turns to fear.
I was preoccupied with a certain 'happy event' that happened today. I lost track of my surroundings and accidentally walked into Kajimachi. Damn!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: She's in cahoots with you. That's what you're happy about?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Chairman, I just got her out of the police station, is all. The cops started chasing her as soon as she arrived in Mitsukue. She only just slipped out.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: She's come back here out of genuine concern for her home. If you're unhappy about something, please, take it up with me. Do not blame her!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: As for my trespassing into Kajimachi—shall I'll perform a dogeza, offer a formal apology on another date, or cut off a finger—
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Ha! You'd do any of those things if I asked?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: The decision is yours—
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: *huff huff* Oyabun! I ran around to everyone asking where you were, until I found out you'd come here to Kajimachi!
attributes.name: Reckless Yakuza

attributes.content: Why did you make the trip out here? That old bastard doesn't have many days left—why bother coming to this forsaken place?
attributes.name: Reckless Yakuza

attributes.content: O-Oyabun?
attributes.name: Reckless Yakuza

attributes.content: You know I'm your oyabun?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Then do you know who gave this 'oyabun' the lofty position that he holds today?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I—
attributes.name: Reckless Yakuza

attributes.content: Ah, right, this isn't your first offense.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Some time ago, Chairman Tessai forbade me and my men from ever entering Kajimachi again. This is not the first time you've disobeyed that order. Am I right?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Well, I wasn't—
attributes.name: Reckless Yakuza

attributes.content: You were the one who drove those three families out of Kajimachi—plus the two shops that had to shut down, and that was all after Chairman Tessai ordered us to stay out of Kajimachi. Isn't that right?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You knowingly went against his orders. How should we punish you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Beads of sweat form on the flustered gangster's forehead.
The oyabun isn't usually like this—he toasts me when I do well and offers gentle encouragement when I fall short.
Before he can even finish his thought, he hears a sound.
*swish*
Wait!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Kinbee, what are you doing?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Before he can even finish his thought, it's cut short—the gangster's headless body collapses to the ground with a thud.
Neither Tessai's iron fan nor Hoshiguma's Hannya can match the quick draw of the Phidia's long sword.
That was your Kinsekikai brother!
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Murdering a member of the family right in front of me. Is this your way of raising a hand against me?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: But Chairman, you've already given me managerial control of the clan.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He ignored warnings, defied the chairman, and refused to change—he should've died long ago. The fact that he lived this long is a failure of my leadership.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Well, I brought her here; my work is done. It's time I answered for disobeying Chairman Tessai's orders.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He aims his bloodstained long sword—still unsheathed—at his finger.
Before the old man can even speak, the Phidia swings his blade, and his left pinkie falls to the floor.
There. That should atone for my sins, yeah?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: No one says anything.
The Phidia slides the blade back into its sheath, bows deeply to Tessai, and gives a small nod to Hoshiguma.
Chairman Tessai, I will now take my leave, so as not to bother you further.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Welcome home, Hoshiguma.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm going to call the police—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma's voice trails off, as she becomes lost in thought, remembering how Kinbee swaggered around the police station.
The old man squints his eyes slightly, as he glances at Hoshiguma.
It seems you've been getting on well in Lungmen. You've forsaken the life of crime, eh?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: If you still walked the path, you would remember this—no matter how a man dies, someone always comes to clean up.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: And as long as the cleanup happens, the police won't bother themselves with our 'messes'.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: You've had a long trip. Let's talk inside.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Though she has been away for twenty years, Hoshiguma still pushes open the gate with practiced ease.
Just like in Kajimachi, time has not left much of a mark on this place. Hoshiguma immediately spots the little path she used to take—the quickest way across the courtyard.
She can't tell whether the koi in the pond have lived all these years, or if the owner has been quietly replacing them with identical ones.
I'm back.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sit.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Uncle Tessai, did you write me that letter because Kinbee—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I never wrote you a letter.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: It wasn't you?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: When you left Mitsukue twenty years ago, I told you we would never again make contact. I intended to honor that promise.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: So, that letter...?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kinbee forged it. What else could it be?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Why would he do that? You're the chairman of the Kinsekikai. How could you permit such a transgression?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Chairman? If that viper didn't keep calling me that, I'd have forgotten I was chairman of anything.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Look, I'm an old man with no real power. Even my last parcel of turf, Kajimachi, is about to be taken from me.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: And Kinbee... heh, he's taken over the Originium crystal business that I built from the ground up. He's taken control of all our operations.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: He's started new ventures like a TV network and even a talent agency, and made them hugely successful.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: So he's usurped all Kinsekikai businesses and is now planning to take over Kajimachi?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: 'A radical rebirth and redevelopment plan' — that was how he put it, just a month ago.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Who's rebirthing what? How are they redeveloping it? Who keeps the proceeds? Ha. These are not questions I can ask, of course.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: That's why you forbade him and his men from entering Kajimachi.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: And today we get this grand performance, where he uses his minion's life as a stage prop… no, not a performance, it was a show of force.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: He didn't used to be like this.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: He was a better actor back then. He tricked me, and he tricked you. That's the only possible explanation, no?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: You didn't realize that finger-chopping bit was all a ploy?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: A... a ploy?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: A fake finger? Surgical reattachment? A prosthesis? He's got no shortage of tricks.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: He wasn't 'atoning for his sins'. He was spitting in my face! He was making a mockery of the Kinsekikai, of everything we stand for.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I don't know what scheme Kinbee had in bringing you back, but there's only one thing you should do now: return to Lungmen, and don't ever come back again. He's a rabid tuskbeast now.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: But what will happen to you?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Me? As long as the Kinsekikai still exist, I'm still their chairman by title. Kinbee wouldn't dare raise a hand against me, at least not out in the open. And that's enough.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I can't just leave.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Then what do you intend to do? Wait until Kinbee has pushed me to the brink and then end my suffering?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I just don't want any more regrets this time.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: So you regret going to Lungmen?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: No. Everything I regret... is from my time in Mitsukue.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Watching Kinbee cut that man's head off like it was nothing... it sent all kinds of regret bubbling up from my stomach.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kinbee's men see Kajimachi as nothing more than a pimple on Mitsukue's hide. You can't change their minds about that.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I'm going to do whatever I can.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: By the way, amidst our grim conversation I almost forgot to ask... what happened with Hannya? When Kinbee was here, I took a glance at it. Looks different than it did the day I gave it to you, no?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Well, to be honest, a corner got sliced off.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: How?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: With a sword.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The old man's world-weary gaze suddenly flares with intensity.
Whose sword? What was it made of? How was their sword technique? Did they use any Arts?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: A good friend of mine back in Lungmen, a colleague—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Explaining it all with words is going to take too long. Give Hannya to me. Let me see it.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Huh—tsk tsk...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: A cut like this doesn't come from advanced reinforced steel or simple Arts alone. Sure, there's always someone stronger out there—but let's not forget, Hannya's no ordinary shield.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: ...Chi Xiao.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Uncle Tessai, you can tell just by looking at the cut?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Don't forget, I've been around. Back when I was knocking back drinks with the Yanese trade envoys, the name 'Chi Xiao' came up more than once.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: For Hannya, being bested by Chi Xiao is no shame at all.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: At the end of the day, it wasn't sharpness or toughness that turned Chi Xiao and Hannya into legendary weapons.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Your mind was weaker than Chi Xiao's wielder. Not by much, but enough to turn the tide of battle.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: In that case, I guess Kinbee's letter wasn't totally useless. At least it gave Hannya a chance.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Do you want to reforge it?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Of course. Do you expect me to let you run around Lungmen with this broken shield?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Still... I need to think for a bit about how I'll reforge this shield, to give you a sliver of a chance to best Chi Xiao. Let me think it over...
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: The old man, who once stared down disaster unblinking, now burns with the impatience of youth. He's learned that there's someone stronger out there, and he yearns to test his mettle.
The old acquaintance's long sword has just shattered any sort of 'parting sorrow', yet nostalgia stirs in Hoshiguma all the same.
Heh. Forget it. This isn't something you and I can figure out by just sitting here and thinking about it. Give me some time.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: You've spent all night in an interrogation room. You must be tired. Go to the guest room and get some sleep.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I want to pay my respects to my father first.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm sorry.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: He's your biological father. What are you apologizing to me for?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Is that clinic, my old home, still there?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's there, but no one has lived in it for about a decade. I'd bet it doesn't much resemble its former self.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: The abandoned house in the alley at the end of Kajimachi's North Street... everyone calls it the 'Haunted House'.
After the vicious Oni disappeared, Shimasu, who was the shateigashira, moved into the house with his family, but within three months, he fell ill and passed away.
Six months later, Sanoguchi, who was then serving as wakagashira-hosa, bought the house. After hiring an onmyoji to perform rites for seven days and nights, he moved in with his new bride.

On the seventh night, a patrolman heard wretched wails coming from the 'Haunted House'. In a fit of madness, Sanoguchi took up his family's heirloom blade, killed his wife, and then took his own life.
In the years that followed, every soul who deigned to live in the Haunted House met a terrible end. Eventually, no one dared go near it again.
Legend has it that the vicious Oni never really disappeared. From time to time, her tortured visage will pop up in the Haunted House.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: And so, today...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It's too dark in here. I can't see anything...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Lights lantern) M-Mio-san, are you there?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Whoa!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It's a pull-top!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka, calm down. The camera on your head is shaking all over the place.
attributes.name: Voice in Earphones

attributes.content: Where did Mio-san go? She said she'd be here with me.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She's feeling under the weather. She called in sick today.
attributes.name: Voice in Earphones

attributes.content: I've known Mio-san for years, and I've never seen her get sick. Last winter, I watched her eat twenty ice creams with my own eyes, and she was completely fine. You're telling me she caught a cold? I don't believe it.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka, we're just trying to add some color here for TV. Work with us, okay?
attributes.name: Voice in Earphones

attributes.content: But I just saw that Oni at the stage, and now I'm going to visit her haunted house...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Ugh. Relax. You're going to be fine.
attributes.name: Voice in Earphones

attributes.content: Alright... I'll do my best.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Ugh, why are there so many pull-tops here?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I don't like this... Wait! What's that sound behind me?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Who's there?
The vicious Oni? A ghost?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It's you? What are you doing in my house?
Momoka grabs something shaped like a stick from the ground and points it at the shadowy figure.
But she quickly realizes that whatever she has picked up will be ineffective against ghosts or a fierce, vicious Oni. In a hurry, she shoves the stick-thing into her coat and pulls out a box...
...of roasted soybeans.
Vicious Oni! I-I've got roasted soybeans! If you dare come closer, I'll waste you!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Oni wa soto! Fuku wa uchi! Oni wa soto, fuku... fuku... err... uh...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The beans aren't working. But I have some salt here too! Check it out! Salt!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The thing... you... fear... most...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Well, I guess I'll be going. Sorry for intruding. Sorry for bothering you. Byebye. Sayounara!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hey! Wait a second!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, I don't think I will!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: My head!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Are you alright?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka, who has just struck her head on something, starts to fall to the ground. However, 'the ghost's' voice jolts her back on her feet.
I'm fine. I'm fine. Sorry for bothering you.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I've got uh, kids, and my parents, they're so old... to take care of back home!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: No! Hasuke is at home, waiting for me to water him! Let me go! I have to go take care of him!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: In her panic, Momoka lets out a high note she's never even hit in the recording studio.
Later that day, as the production team looks at the footage, they are unsure which one of the two, Momoka or Hoshiguma, most resembles a wailing wraith.
What... what is that thing at my feet?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You're asking me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No! I didn't ask you! Let me go!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The terrified girl suddenly disappears, kicking up a massive cloud of dust.
Perplexed, Hoshiguma leans in for a closer look, and finally sees what happened.
She smashed right through the floorboards.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma
